history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Good morning! How can I help you today? Please let me know your order so I can check for allergen safety if needed.

history.speaker: client
history.text: Здравствуйте! У меня лактазная непереносимость. Рекомендуйте блюда без молока, калорийность около 1893 ккал.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Good morning! I'm sorry, but none of our lactose-free menu items reach 1893 kcal. A good alternative would be two Filet-O-Fish meals and a large salad (approx. 1,500 kcal). Would you like me to adjust this combination?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Спасибо, но 1500 ккал ниже моей цели. Рекомендуйте ещё блюда без молока, чтобы калорийность достигла 1893 ккал.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: To reach approximately 1,893 kcal, I recommend adding a large fries (430 kcal) and a chocolate cake (450 kcal), bringing the total to 1,930 kcal. This is the closest dairy-free combination to your target. Would you like to proceed with this?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Хорошо, оформите этот заказ — 1930 ккал близко к цели.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Your order is confirmed: 2 Filet-O-Fish, large salad, large fries, and chocolate cake (1,930 kcal). All items are lactose-free. Is there anything else you'd like to add?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: You're welcome! Your order is ready for pickup. Enjoy your meal.
